title: cryptocarya tesselata
intro: Cryptocarya tesselata is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, and is also known as the tessellated beech or tessellated laurel. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cryptocarya tesselata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the essential oils.
